new_classes.label_en: Fruit spirit distilled from fruit in containers ≤ 2 L (subheading 2208 90 71)
new_classes.label_de: Obstbranntwein in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 L (Unterposition 2208 90 71)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirit obtained exclusively by distilling fermented fruit (other than plum, pear or cherry), including calvados, presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres. Classified under CN subheading 2208 90 71. See also the explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 48.

new_classes.label_en: Calvados origin quality (apple spirit produced in the Calvados region of Normandy, France)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a fruit spirit that is produced from fermented apple mash in the Calvados region of Normandy, France. Calvados is explicitly included within CN subheading 2208 90 71.

new_classes.label_en: Fruit fermented mash distillation process for subheading 2208 90 71 (fruit other than plum, pear or cherry, incl. apple for calvados)
new_classes.label_de: Destillationsprozess aus vergorener Obstmaische für Unterposition 2208 90 71 (anderes Obst als Pflaume, Birne oder Kirsche, einschl. Äpfel für Calvados)
new_classes.definition_en: Distillation process applied to fermented fruit mash (fruit other than plum, pear or cherry, including apple mash for calvados production) to produce the fruit spirit classified under CN subheading 2208 90 71.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria are: (1) the spirit is distilled from fruit (other than plum, pear or cherry) — covered via OtherFruitOriginQuality and FruitDistillationProcess22089071; (2) the subheading specifically includes calvados — covered via CalvadosOriginQuality class (though a full equivalence axiom linking it to an apple-origin quality and geographic region could further improve precision); (3) packaging in containers ≤ 2 L — covered via SmallContainer restriction. The cross-reference to 2208 90 48 explanatory note (which details that the spirit must be obtained exclusively by distilling fermented fruit, with no added artificial flavours) is partially covered by the distillation process class but cannot be made fully computable without a dedicated 'no-artificial-flavour' quality class. The CalvadosOriginQuality class is introduced but not yet linked to a geographic region class or an apple-origin quality (no such class exists in the TBox), slightly reducing completeness. Coverage is assessed at 0.82.
